name: Message group
goal: Cluster consecutive same-role chat messages with shared metadata, suppressing repeated avatars and headers on follow-up bubbles for cleaner conversation timelines.
description: Layout wrapper that renders a group-level avatar and header (author + timestamp) exactly once, then stacks slotted message children with tightened inter-bubble spacing. Role-driven alignment mirrors ce-chat-bubble: user groups align right, all others left. On every slotchange, the group sets the follow-up attribute on every slotted ce-chat-bubble after the first, so each follow-up bubble hides its own avatar column and header line — collapsing repeated chrome in the cluster. Compact mode further reduces the gap. Pure presentation; emits no events.

props.name: role
props.description: Group role; drives color alignment and avatar placement. Overrides the LitElement-inherited role accessor.

props.name: author
props.description: Optional group-level author name rendered once in the group header.

props.name: timestamp
props.description: Optional group-level timestamp rendered once in the group header.

props.name: compact
props.description: Tighter spacing between clustered bubbles when true.

slots.description: The messages — typically ce-chat-bubble children, but any element is accepted.

slots.name: avatar
slots.description: Group-level avatar rendered once on the role-aligned side. Hidden via :has(::slotted(*)) when empty.

slots.name: header
slots.description: Optional custom group header rendered above the messages stack, taking precedence over the auto-generated author/timestamp line.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-2
cssVariables.description: Default inter-bubble gap and header bottom margin.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-3
cssVariables.description: Outer grid gap between avatar column and body column.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-4
cssVariables.description: Outer vertical margin of the group.

cssVariables.name: --ce-muted
cssVariables.description: Avatar fallback text color and header secondary color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text
cssVariables.description: Author name color in the group header.

sideEffects.description: Sets aria-roledescription=message group on the host so assistive tech identifies the cluster without conflating it with the chat-role attribute.
sideEffects.reason: Reconciles the role= chat-role API with screen-reader expectations.

a11y.notes: aria-roledescription=message group identifies the cluster to assistive tech. The role attribute carries the chat role, not an ARIA role. Each child ce-chat-bubble retains its own aria-roledescription=message.
